title: pilosella schultesii subsp. silvicola
intro: Pilosella schultesii subsp. silvicola is a subspecies of the Pilosella schultesii plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is commonly known as a medicinal herb, and its leaves, stems, and roots are used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pilosella schultesii subsp. silvicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, sore throats, and skin conditions.
